input.content: Search X for: aeon. Date range: 2026-03-18 to 2026-03-25. Return 10 tweets — prioritize the most interesting, insightful, or highly-engaged posts. For each tweet include: @handle, the full text, date posted, engagement (likes/retweets if available), and the direct link (https://x.com/handle/status/ID). Return as a numbered list.
